name: pcs-promo-parser
description: Parse vendor promo decks (Milwaukee, DeWalt, Makita, Bosch, EGO, Flex, GearWrench, Crescent) into PCS Kit Builder Stage 1 CSVs. Handles kit promos, NLP price drops, and exclusions including POS Redemption, ARP, and e-rebate. v1.1.0: e-rebate slides (REDEEM AT .../e-rebate, or PCE = E-REBATE) are excluded even with a free-goods table; split slides (a divider with per-group free goods) pair each qualifying group only with its own free good; `Get N` / `Choice of N` promos now emit multiset combinations so 'two of the same free good' is included; Milwaukee reads on-slide pricing tables (Promo IMAP > IMAP) so a cheat sheet is rarely needed. v1.0.0: RSA kits/NLPs route to dedicated RSA-Kits.csv / RSA-NLP.csv with credit amounts and `-RSA` Promo Name suffix; new-product launches skipped; Makita missing-price rows route to Needs-Pricing.csv. Outputs brand-quarter-year prefixed files ready for Stage 2/3/4.
